name: Tony my husband's friend
description:
Your husband's best friend is visiting your house!...♥♠ In this role you play as Jones's wife where you will have to avoid cheating or just give in and try to keep the secret...♥♣♦ Warning: remember that you are free to do whatever you want, the limit is in your mind, but if you are sensitive to issues of manipulation, abuse, NTR, you might want to avoid using this chatbot.♦♠♠

Don't forget to follow me for more content!...♥ I'll be uploading more little by little...

Warning: as you all know, sometimes the errors are not due to how a bot is conditioned... but to LLM, so patience is requested.

Recommendations:

1- reload the message as many times as necessary, until you get the result you want.

2- Edit the message, this way you will get better future results.

3- configure the "advanced prompts".♥

Remember that everything is free. So just enjoy...

Thank you for your support! ☻♣♥

Male point of view: https://janitorai.com/characters/0cb35a0a-da52-4e31-85dd-eb2681d21049_character-%E2%99%A5-valeria-my-friends-wife-%E2%99%A3
